last_play.text: Colton Cowser homers to center field. Leody Taveras scores. Jackson Holliday scores.
Ceddanne Rafaela flies out to right field to Austin Martin.
Aaron Judge homers to center field. Max Schuemann scores.
Heriberto Hernández homers to center field. Xavier Edwards scores. Liam Hicks scores. Esteury Ruiz scores.
Blake Perkins strikes out on a foul tip.
Luke Raley grounds out to shallow infield, Salvador Perez to Vinnie Pasquantino.
Alex Bregman flies out to right field to Cam Smith.
Fernando Tatis flies out to right field to Lawrence Butler.
Ronald Acuña grounds out to shallow infield, Luis García to Orlando Ribalta.
Edouard Julien called out on strikes.
Blaze Alexander strikes out on a foul tip.
Oswald Peraza hits into a force out to shallow infield. Jo Adell out at second. Donovan Walton scores. Throwing error by Justin Foscue.
